examples: For those of you who have never heard French before, when you hear somebody say, "Je ne sais pas," you could say, "Remarkable!"
He has that je ne sais quoi that distinguishes a professional from an amateur.
A2M1, for instance, means à demain, or "see you tomorrow". JTM is je t'aime (I love you).
But when she performed "Je ne regrette rien" the roof came off the theatre.
Everyone else fled after two residents, both pig-farm wor kers, died of Japanese encephalitis (JE).
